---
name: New curve request
about: Suggest a research-grounded target curve to add to the library
title: "[curve] "
labels: enhancement, curve
---

## Curve name

Proposed identifier (e.g. `sonarworks_inroom`).

## Source / citation

Link to the paper, vendor file, or publication that defines this curve.
curveforge only ships curves with a clear, citable source.

## Native parameters

What user-tunable knobs should the curve expose? (e.g. shelf level,
corner frequency, slope.)

## Reference shape

If the curve is published as a set of breakpoints, paste them here or
link to the file. They'll be bundled under `src/curveforge/curves/data/`.

## Use case

Who would use this curve and when? (Music? Cinema? Niche genre?)
